M2310_ECR_OTHR_HRT_DEASE M2310 Emergent Care Reason- Other Heart Disease This field indicates that the reason the patient received emergent care was due to other heart disease. 0 = Not Checked (No), 1 = Checked (Yes) CHAR 1 x x x x
M2310_ECR_RSPRTRY_OTHR M2310 Emergent Care Reason- Other Respiratory Problem This field indicates that the reason the patient received emergent care was due to other respiratory problem.
